race.comment: HOUSEWIFE (10) lined up for new trainer last start and was having her first attempt on a dirt track when seventh, beaten 6 lengths, at this track over 1200m. She'll be better for that effort and vast improvement is on the cards. ZORBRIST (5) was thereabouts last time out when second over 1200m at this track. Has three wins at the trip. Right in the mix. DELICATE RULER (8) finished 2.5 lengths away in fifth last time out over 1200m at this track after being in the firing line on the corner a week ago as $2.9 favourite. Steps up in journey today. Should be prominent from the outset. Capable of testing this field. JEALOUS (11) last appeared when she finished seventh over 3040m at Mornington on December 17. Hasn't scored when fresh from a break but generally races well with two minor placings. Has switched to the McLaughlin yard. Has found a suitable race and is worth including. AROUND THE BUOY (7) won't be far away.
